name: RSA Archer
description: This app implements ticket management actions on RSA Archer GRC

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: Application/Module name (e.g. Incidents)

parameters.name: json_string
parameters.description: JSON data string

actions.name: Update Ticket
actions.description: Update the value of a field of a record

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: Application/Module name (e.g. Incidents)

parameters.name: content_id
parameters.description: Content ID (Identifies the specific record)

parameters.name: name_field
parameters.description: Name of Tracking ID field (e.g. "Incident ID")

parameters.name: name_value
parameters.description: Name of record (e.g. "INC-1234")

parameters.name: field_id
parameters.description: ID or name of the field to update in the record

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: New value of the record's field (Comma-separated values allowed if Users or Groups to be updated to a field)

parameters.name: json_string
parameters.description: JSON data string

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: Application/Module name (e.g. Incidents)

parameters.name: content_id
parameters.description: Content ID (Identifies the specific record)

parameters.name: name_field
parameters.description: Name of Tracking ID field (e.g. "Incident ID")

parameters.name: name_value
parameters.description: Name of record (e.g. "INC-1234")

actions.name: List Tickets
actions.description: Get a list of tickets in an application

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: Application/Module name (e.g. Incidents)

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Max number of records to return

parameters.name: name_field
parameters.description: Name of field to search in (e.g. "Incident ID")

parameters.name: search_value
parameters.description: Value to search for in this application

parameters.name: results_filter_json
parameters.description: JSON with field names and values of results filter for this application

parameters.name: results_filter_operator
parameters.description: Boolean operator of key/value pairs in the results filter JSON for this application (its value would be "and" if only one condition is specified)

parameters.name: results_filter_equality
parameters.description: Equality operator of key/value pairs in the results filter JSON for this application

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: Vault ID of the file

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: File name

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Get a list of tickets from a report

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: Report GUID

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Max number of records to return

parameters.name: max_pages
parameters.description: Max number of report pages to return

parameters.name: results_filter_json
parameters.description: JSON with field names and values of results filter for a report

parameters.name: results_filter_operator
parameters.description: Boolean operator of key/value pairs in the results filter JSON for a report (its value would be "and" if only one condition is specified)

parameters.name: results_filter_equality
parameters.description: Equality operator of key/value pairs in the results filter JSON for a report

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Callback action for the on_poll ingest functionality

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored for this app

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored for this app

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of container records to query for

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of artifact records to query for

actions.name: Assign Ticket
actions.description: Assign users and/or groups to record

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: Application/Module name (e.g. Incidents)

parameters.name: content_id
parameters.description: Content ID (Identifies the specific record)

parameters.name: name_field
parameters.description: Name of Tracking ID field (e.g. "Incident ID")

parameters.name: name_value
parameters.description: Name of record (e.g. "INC-1234")

parameters.name: field_id
parameters.description: Field id of field to add users or groups

parameters.name: users
parameters.description: Users to assign to incident/tasks. Provide numeric values (Comma-separated values allowed)

parameters.name: groups
parameters.description: Groups to assign to incident/tasks. Provide numeric values (Comma-separated values allowed)

actions.name: Attach Alert
actions.description: Attach Security alert to the record

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: Application/Module name (e.g. Security Incidents)

parameters.name: content_id
parameters.description: Content ID (Identifies the specific incident)

parameters.name: name_field
parameters.description: Name of Tracking ID field (e.g. "Incident ID")

parameters.name: name_value
parameters.description: Name of record (e.g. "INC-1234")

parameters.name: field_id
parameters.description: Field ID of field to edit. If not provided, searches for Field ID of Security Alerts field

parameters.name: security_alert_id
parameters.description: Security Alert that will be assigned to record (Comma-separated values allowed)
